note: The active first-pass grid has six source-evidence categories. These categories come from the existing Twin catalog/profile mapping, not unsupervised clustering. Each prompt-facing card exposes only the named evidence category; demographic background appears only in the background-only category.

variants.name: twin_pgg_direct_social_only
variants.purpose: Direct trust, ultimatum, and dictator task evidence.

variants.name: twin_pgg_self_report_social_only
variants.purpose: Social/personality questionnaire evidence without direct game behavior.

variants.name: twin_pgg_misc_heuristics_pricing_text_only
variants.purpose: Residual heuristics, pricing, and open-text evidence.
